prompt: A 1920s Art Deco trading floor dashboard with geometric patterns, gold and black color scheme, and elegant typography displaying stock market data
prompt_refined: A 1920s Art Deco trading floor dashboard. It features intricate geometric patterns, a dominant gold and black color scheme, and elegant, custom-styled typography. The dashboard clearly displays stylized stock market data visualizations, including real-time quotes, charts, and indices, all integrated seamlessly into the distinct Art Deco design aesthetic.
